description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem substations. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, iarray = astationint(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: Number of nodes in the substation.
Number of parent buses in the substation.
Number of bus sections in the substation.
Number of substation switching devices in the substation.

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
